metadata.description: The IoT Hub Event Hub Endpoint
The IoT Hub Connection String (reference only, retrieve from portal)

iotHubEndpointDescription.value: Retrieve connection string from Azure Portal - IoT Hub → Shared access policies → owner

variables.$fxv#0:
<policies>
  <inbound>
    <rate-limit-by-key calls="300" renewal-period="60" counter-key="@(context.Request.IpAddress)" />
    <validate-jwt header-name="Authorization" failed-validation-httpcode="401" failed-validation-error-message="Unauthorized">
      <openid-config url="{{oauth-openid-config-url}}" />
      <audiences>
        <audience>{{oauth-audience}}</audience>
      </audiences>
    </validate-jwt>
  </inbound>
  <backend>
  </backend>
  <outbound>
    <set-header name="X-Correlation-Id" exists-action="skip">
      <value>@((string)context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("X-Correlation-Id", Guid.NewGuid().ToString()))</value>
    </set-header>
  </outbound>
  <on-error>
  </on-error>
</policies>
